title: Banner Claim
description: Claim your place in the world with only a banner and an ingot block.
body: # 🏰 **Banner Claim** 🏰 ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f00f5849e3675b3aa388c2228ef24b3e580de91d.png) ### Claim Your Territory with Style and Precision! Transform the way you secure your Minecraft world with **Banner Claim**! Harness the power of banners and precious blocks to define your domain and manage your territory effortlessly. ## Features: - 🏴 **Dynamic Claiming System**: Secure land by placing a banner on Copper, Iron, Gold, or Diamond blocks to create expansive claims: - **Copper**: 16x16x16 - **Iron**: 32x32x32 - **Gold**: 64x64x64 - **Diamond**: 128x128x128 - **Netherite**: 256x256x256 - 🔍 **Visible Claims**: Easily see your claimed areas with F3. - ✨ **Customizable Names**: Rename your claim with ease using `/bc rename {name}`. - 👥 **Manage Members**: Add or remove players from your claim with `/bc add {player}` and `/bc remove {player}`. - 🗺️ **View Claims**: Check all your claims and the players you've added with `/bc me`. - ⚙️ **Fabric 1.21.1**: Fully compatible with Fabric mod loader for Minecraft 1.21.1. ## Available Commands - **`/bc me`** - Show all your owned claims - **`/bc list`** - Show all server claims (OP only) - **`/bc rename `** - Rename your claim - **`/bc unclaim `** - Delete your claim - **`/bc add `** - Add player to claim - **`/bc remove `** - Remove player from claim ## Keybinds - **`H key`** - Toggle claim boundary visualization Secure your territory, manage your claims, and dominate your Minecraft world with **Banner Claim**. Download now and build your empire!
